title: Many Iranians Are Glad the Fighting Has Paused. Some Hard-liners Aren’t.
summary_full: The most fervent backers of the Islamic republic believe pausing the war for negotiations risks squandering what they see as a hard-won upper hand.
summary_public: The most fervent backers of the Islamic republic believe pausing the war for negotiations risks squandering what they see as a hard-won upper hand.
